MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File An Amended Complaint To Substitute Defendants True Name In Place Of Does
Off Calendar Nov-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LORNA MARKUS' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File An Amended Complaint To Substitute Defendant's True Name In Place Of Does.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for leave to file an amended complaint to substitute defendant's true name in place of Does" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
